title: EUREKA 2 — Mama's lesson lands
prompt: Medium shot in @backyard-kitchen. @Mama kneels in the CENTER on the grass, smiling warmly. @Sara on the LEFT crouches on the grass listening attentively. @Eva on the RIGHT crouches on the grass listening with wide eyes.
